gaps: a stats/query filter for snapshot shape (e.g. opinion-cluster-derived dockets with no entries), which is the population this case actually belongs to
surfacing the linked cluster's disposition or opinion text in the snapshot itself for sparse dockets
helpful: fedcourts stats --group-by term_year (the no-Term bucket matched this docket's shape)
fedcourts query --court scotus priors showing how opinion-derived dockets get labeled
notes: Snapshot carried almost no case-specific signal, so the corpus base rates did all the calibration work; without fedcourts stats this would have been a guess.
